name: mcp-skill-demo
title: Word Explorer (MCP + Skill demo)
description: Four-step teaching workflow: human input -> deterministic script -> agent using a custom MCP (wordtools.anagrams) -> agent using a custom skill (word-poem).

steps.name: Analyze Word
steps.description: Deterministic stats (no LLM). Reads {word} from /output/input.json, writes /workspace/state.json + /output/result.json.

steps.name: Find Anagrams (MCP)
steps.description: Agent step using the custom wordtools MCP. Reads the word from /workspace/state.json, calls the anagrams tool, writes /workspace/anagrams.json.

agent.prompt: Read the JSON file at /workspace/state.json and take its `word` field. Call the `anagrams` tool from the `wordtools` MCP server with that word. Write the JSON {"word": <the word>, "anagrams": <the list the tool returned>} to BOTH /workspace/anagrams.json (so the next step can read it) and /output/anagrams.json (a downloadable Output File). Then write /output/result.json as {"status": "success", "word": <the word>, "anagram_count": <number of anagrams>}.

mcpServers.name: wordtools
mcpServers.description: Offline word tools — anagrams(word) returns dictionary words formable from a word's letters.

steps.name: Write Poem (Skill)
steps.description: Agent step using the custom word-poem skill to write a short poem from the word + anagrams in /workspace.
